message: No unit test failures detected on main. All failing CI check runs were investigated across the 5 most recent commits. Every failing check run showed 0 failed tests (tests are all passing). The CI pipeline failures are infrastructure-level issues: manifest/publish step failures, Windows runner Cmd.exe exit-255 errors, DNS network failures, PoliCheck compliance scan errors, and broken link check failures — none of which are unit test failures. No GitHub issue needs to be created.
